conflict_type: Conflicts between Keyword Constraints and Phrase Constraints
seed_instruction: Draft an email to a hotel requesting room availability for next weekend.
org_constraint: Conclude the email with "Looking forward to your response."
new_constraint: Avoid using the keyword "forward" in the email.
instruction: Draft an email to a hotel requesting room availability for next weekend. Conclude the email with "Looking forward to your response." Avoid using the keyword "forward" in the email.
response:
Subject: Room Availability Inquiry – Next Weekend

Dear Hotel Management Team,

I hope this message finds you well.

I am writing to inquire about room availability for next weekend, specifically from Friday, October 26th, to Sunday, October 28th. We are planning a short getaway and would appreciate it if you could let us know which room categories are open during those dates.

Please include any details regarding special amenities, parking options, or early check-in possibilities if available. If there are any last-minute cancellations or upgrades we might be interested in, please feel free to share those details as well.

Thank you for your time and assistance.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
[Your Phone Number]
[Your Email Address]

Looking forward to your response.
